rulings.Case Title: LYNN R. BARANCO et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Third Motion To Compel Defendant General Cable Corporations Person(S) Most Knowledgeable|Custodian Of Records Depositions And Request For Production Of Documents; And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Wednesday, June 23, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel Defendant General Cable Corporations Person(S) Most Knowledgeable|Custodian Of Records Depositions And Request For Production Of Documents; And Request For Sanctions is continued on the court¿s own motion to June 30, 2010 to provide the parties an opportunity to further meet and confer in an effort to agree on: 1) a date for Mr. Katz¿s deposition; 2) whether there is need for a further deposition of Mr. Gabel and, if so, a date for the deposition; 3) where there is a need for a deposition of a custodian or records and, if so, a date for the deposition and 4) whether any further documents should be produced. If the parties have not reached full agreement on all these issues before then, by 4pm on June 29 they need to send an email to constestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without further argument, what issues remain in dispute and then appear at the hearing on June 30 at 9:00 a.m. =(220/HEK)
